text.title: Use Case Modeling — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is behaviour (not data shape) the dominant axis for this slice?

conclusion.verdict: skip — use a data model instead

branch.when: axis == behaviour AND actor_known AND existing_use_case_age < 90d
axis == behaviour AND actor_known AND no_existing_use_case

example.trace: ENG-42 → behaviour axis → actor=customer → draft new login-2FA use case
